phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar o meu bilhete de papel?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR AW MEHOO bee-LYEH-tih DIH puh-PEHL?

likely_response.local: Valide o bilhete nas máquinas de autoatendimento ou no balcão da CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: vuh-LEE-dih AW bee-LYEH-tih NUHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH ow-toouh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too OHW NOO bahl-KOWN DUH seh-PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Validate the ticket at the self-service machines or at the CP counter.

responses.english: Validate the ticket at the self-service machines or at the CP counter.
responses.phonetic: vuh-LEE-dih AW bee-LYEH-tih NUHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH ow-toouh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too OHW NOO bahl-KOWN DUH seh-PEH.
responses.french: Valide o bilhete nas máquinas de autoatendimento ou no balcão da CP.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de espera?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese stations typically separate regional and long-distance services.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para a Sala de Espera CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh seh-PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs for the CP waiting room.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs for the CP waiting room.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh seh-PEH.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas para a Sala de Espera CP.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the CP waiting room is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a sala de espera da CP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh DUH seh-PEH?
phrases.cultural_note: CP waiting areas are reserved for long-distance and intercity passengers.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala de Espera CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh seh-PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the CP waiting room.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the CP waiting room.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh seh-PEH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Sala de Espera CP.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o quiosque de jornais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH zhoo-ruh-NEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Kiosks typically sell tickets, snacks, and local press.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o quiosque de jornais.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH zhoo-ruh-NEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the news kiosk.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the news kiosk.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH zhoo-ruh-NEYESH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o quiosque de jornais.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar o meu bilhete de papel?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR AW MEHOO bee-LYEH-tih DIH puh-PEHL?

likely_response.local: Valide o seu bilhete nas máquinas de autoatendimento ou dirija-se ao balcão da CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: vuh-LEE-dih AW SEHOO bee-LYEH-tih NUHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH ow-toouh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too OHW dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DUH seh-PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Validate your ticket at the self-service machines or go to the CP counter.

responses.english: Validate your ticket at the self-service machines or go to the CP counter.
responses.phonetic: vuh-LEE-dih AW SEHOO bee-LYEH-tih NUHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH ow-toouh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too OHW dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DUH seh-PEH.
responses.french: Valide o seu bilhete nas máquinas de autoatendimento ou dirija-se ao balcão da CP.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the central footbridge is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a passarela central das plataformas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH puh-suh-REH-luh sayngt-RAHL DUHSH pluh-tuh-FOH-ruh-muhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The footbridge connects all platforms and features elevators.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a passarela central.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-suh-REH-luh sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the central footbridge.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the central footbridge.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-suh-REH-luh sayngt-RAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a passarela central.

phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde fica a plataforma um?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh OONNG?
phrases.cultural_note: Platforms at Faro station are accessed via the central overpass. Platform 1 is on the right as you cross.

likely_response.translation_en: On the central walkway, to the right.

responses.english: On the central walkway, to the right.
